title: CobbleBadges
description: Now's your chance to beat all the gym leaders and get all them badges for You to collect!
body:
Do You ever wanted to battle gym leaders in cobblemon and be honored with a little gift wich shows how far you went?

Well.. now You can!
This mod got the bagdes of the gym leaders from the games.
Either You wanna set up a world for you and your friends, or You build up a server where you choose the strongest trainers and let them be the gym leaders, You have a special reward for every player.
![The Badge Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ff45ebdbe8742e5b24c0961ebe4a093b4cad0c.png)
Note: This mod is made to be used in the original mod "Cobblemon", but can be used without it!

Wanna have a look on the badges right now existing? Here You go:

![BoulderBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23ef1cd6eaa87a45407f3982362f76bd16f00b92.png) 

![CascadeBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a3bfa68b827cddb86510c786fcaf91b6c99c5b5.png) 

![ThunderBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f35c252d6551ec265a08e86bee034589596185b5.png) 

![RainbowBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff3e6312644f157e48cad7749f4a1c146cacdc64.png) 

![SoulBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ae1f94502738ae79b7619fb09442dfba41921b.png) 

![MarshBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ad56ee5bdfa5a3e90632b35c11c6a898b9ff75.png) 

![VolcanoBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899f3a2957f35cac683afcee6f226e6a8e53c678.png) 

![EarthBadge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a751639cff0d98fe5fd24f3daade4f94e269ea.png)

- Cobblemon: https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon

Stay tuned for Updates, there will be much more badges soon!

See ya ^^
